name: Colossal Forge
effect: Increase production of all buildings based on buildings built.

name: Charged Clicks
effect: Increase Mana Regeneration additively and multiplicatively based on clicks made this Era.

name: Titan Obelisk
effect: Increase Faction Coin find chance additively based on Neutral time this Reincarnation.
formula: +(6 + 6 * x^0.6)%, where x = Neutral time this Reincarnation

name: Titan Drill
effect: Increase base production of Warrior Barracks/Slave Pens/Deep Mines by +19,635 and Cathedrals/Dark Temples/Monasteries by +98,000 (by alignment). Increase those tiers' production by 2500%.

name: Charged Structures
effect: Increase production of all buildings based on Lightning Strike activity time this Era.
formula: (70 + 70 * x^0.3)%, where x = Lightning Strike activity time this Era

name: Titan Sized Walls
effect: Increase Hall of Legends production based on assistants owned.

name: Cyclopean Strength
effect: Assistants count 200% more. Increase their production based on time spent as Titans this Reincarnation.
formula: (30 + 1.3 * x^0.7)%, where x = Titans time this Reincarnation

name: Heavy Coins
effect: Royal Exchanges production bonus increased by 100% each. Reduces Royal Exchange cost multiplier by 0.01 (becomes 1.09).

name: Oversized Legends
effect: Reduce Hall of Legends cost multiplier by 0.01. Increase assistant production based on Halls of Legends built.
formula: (3 * x^0.9)%, where x = Halls of Legends built

name: Giant Market
effect: Royal Exchanges count more based on highest Mountain Palaces built this Reincarnation.
formula: (x^0.7)%, where x = highest Mountain Palaces this Reincarnation

name: Titanic Authority
effect: Increase production of Unique Buildings based on Royal Exchanges purchased.
formula: (0.6 * x^0.6)%, where x = Royal Exchanges purchased

name: Colossus Kingdom
effect: Multiplicatively increase assistants based on time spent as Order this Reincarnation.
formula: (0.6 * x^0.6)%, where x = Order time this Reincarnation
